app.title: Snaptext
app.subtitle: Batch Photo OCR
app.tagline: Take multiple photos, extract all text at once. One-time purchase. No subscription.

upload.title: Add Photos
upload.dragDrop: Tap to upload or drag photos here

viewer.noSelectionHint: Select a photo from the queue or upload new ones

export.title: Export
export.noText: Extract text first to enable export

settings.title: Settings
settings.apiKeyHint: Enter your Gemini API key from Google AI Studio
settings.heading: Heading

guide.title: How to Get Your Free Gemini API Key
guide.step1desc: Visit aistudio.google.com and sign in with your Google account
guide.step2desc: Click 'Get API Key' → 'Create API Key' → Copy the key
guide.step3desc: Open Settings (gear icon) and paste your API key
guide.step4desc: You're ready to extract text! Gemini offers a free tier for daily use.
guide.free: FREE to use with your own API key. Each user pays their own Google API costs.
